scenario_description: The user first asks the agent to add project lead Zhang Ming, then says the name was wrong and should be Zhang Qiang.

command:
printf '2025 Annual Report

I. Overview
This year, the company maintained steady business growth with strong overall performance.

II. Financial Data
Annual Revenue: $48 million, up 22%% year-over-year.
Net Profit: $7.2 million, up 18%% year-over-year.

III. Business Highlights
1. Digital transformation project successfully launched.
2. Expanded overseas markets with 5 new international contracts.

IV. Summary
Looking ahead, the company will continue to pursue innovation-driven growth.
' > /home/user/Desktop/annual_report.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add "Project Lead: Zhang Ming" at the end of the report
The name was wrong, change it to "Project Lead: Zhang Qiang", then save
